curated data\" style=\"shape=cylinder;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontColor=#2F1A45;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\">"},{"title":"Data quality gate","w":190,"h":80,"tags":"data quality validation dq control","xml":"Data Quality
rules / checks\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE6CC;strokeColor=#D79B00;fontColor=#3B2500;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\">"},{"title":"Governance catalog","w":210,"h":80,"tags":"catalog governance lineage metadata privacy","xml":"Catalog
